title: Heltec V3 6LBR: RPL root + upstream prefix delegation integration
description: Extend lichen_rpl_dodag_init_root() and gateway_rpl_init() in main.c / subsys/lichen/rpl/ to use prefix learned from WiFi backhaul (via net_if or DHCPv6/ND). Advertise upstream /64 into DODAG via DIOs or 6LoWPAN ND proxy per spec appendix-border-router.md and draft-lichen-rpl-lora. Handle multiple BRs gracefully. Update s_rank and /status. Ensure non-storing mode source routing works with WiFi upstream. Add bridging between LoRa L2 net_if and WiFi net_if. Parent of project-LICHEN-sl32.
